title: Sync files from monday items to Google Drive
excerpt:

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ever wish your monday.com files could organise themselves in Google Drive?

Tired of scattered folders and manual uploads? Our Google Drive integration keeps your files perfectly in sync — so your monday.com items and Drive stay connected automatically.

Here’s what it can do:
Sync files instantly — on button click or when a column changes
Auto-create folders when items or subitems are added
Rename Drive folders when item names change
Save folder links right into your monday.com columns
Avoid duplicates — only the latest file shows while older uploads stay safely retained
Choose from over 10 ready-to-use integrations, or ask us for a custom one

You control how and where files get saved with flexible folder structures — and because files go directly from monday.com to Google Drive, your data stays private.

Want to see it live?
Book a quick demo (same-day slots available) or drop us a message with questions or feature requests.

Keep your workflow organised, automated and clutter-free — without ever leaving your board.
